title: Personal Trading Engine Common Contract Definitions v0.1

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the v0.1 shared-contract line.

instrument.description: Canonical instrument identifier. Exact exchange symbol mapping is out of scope.

positiveDecimal.description: Positive base-10 decimal encoded as a string to avoid binary-float drift across languages.

epochMillis.description: UTC Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds bounded to a signed 64-bit integer.
